sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91827" key="purra/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυρρ-άζω</orth>, <sense id="n91827.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be fiery red</tr_>, of the sky, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg001.perseus-grc1:16:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ev.Matt.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
